---
title: "Assignment 5"
author: "Patrick Torralba"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| label: library
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(tidyverse)
library(sf)

```

```{r}
#| label: load counties
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

us_counties.df <- st_read("USA_Counties/USA_Counties.shp") %>% janitor::clean_names()

```



# Task 1: USA Counties Data

```{r}
#| label: fig-KN-counties
#| fig-cap: "Kansas Counties"


```
